task_summary: SP30 made default live terminal HUD focus coherent with live desk speech: the HUD focus row now prefers live desk detail/status/action when live_mew_reads is true, while fixture-terminal output keeps deterministic fixture focus/message.

tests_run.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format human --form cat --watch-count 1 --interval 0
tests_run.result: live speech and HUD focus both use live desk detail text; fixture SP12 focus is no longer in the live HUD

tests_run.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format human --form cat --fixture-terminal --watch-count 1 --interval 0
tests_run.result: fixture-terminal output keeps the deterministic SP12 fixture focus and disabled desk HUD

proof_artifacts: live and fixture terminal smoke outputs inspected
notes: Task #50 stopped with no accepted diff after a broader attempted source/test patch hit verifier failures and rolled back.
